translations.en: You snore too much at night.
translations.yue: 你夜晚瞓覺打鼻鼾太嘈啦。
translations.ru: Ты по ночам слишком сильно храпишь.
translations.vi: Bạn ngáy quá nhiều vào ban đêm.
translations.hi: तुम रात में बहुत ज़्यादा खर्राटे लेते हो.
translations.nb: Du snorker for mye om natten.
translations.id: Kamu mendengkur terlalu keras di malam hari.
translations.sv: Du snarkar för mycket på natten.
translations.da: Du snorker for meget om natten.
translations.ja: あなたは夜にいびきをかきすぎます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular informal; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; agrees with 'Tu'.
Degree adverb meaning excess; modifies the verb 'ronfles'.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun 'nuit'.
Common noun, feminine singular; with 'la' forms a temporal adverbial NP ('la nuit').

sentences.target: Papa ronfle trop dans le train.

translations.fr: Papa ronfle trop dans le train.
translations.en: Dad snores too much on the train.
translations.es: Papá ronca demasiado en el tren.
translations.de: Papa schnarcht im Zug zu viel.
translations.zh-Hans: 爸爸在火车上打呼噜太响了。
translations.yue: 爸爸喺火車上打鼻鼾太嘈啦。
translations.ru: Папа слишком сильно храпит в поезде.
translations.pt: Meu pai ronca demais no trem.
translations.vi: Bố ngáy quá nhiều trên tàu.
translations.nl: Papa snurkt te veel in de trein.
translations.uk: Тато занадто сильно хропе у поїзді.
translations.hu: Apa túl hangosan horkol a vonaton.
translations.hi: पापा ट्रेन में बहुत ज़्यादा खर्राटे लेते हैं.
translations.pl: Tata za bardzo chrapie w pociągu.
translations.el: Ο μπαμπάς ροχαλίζει πολύ στο τρένο.
translations.nb: Pappa snorker for mye på toget.
translations.id: Ayah mendengkur terlalu keras di kereta.
translations.sv: Pappa snarkar för mycket på tåget.
translations.ro: Tata sforăie prea mult în tren.
translations.da: Far snorker for meget i toget.
translations.ja: 父は電車でいびきをかきすぎます。

tokens.explanation: Kinship term used as a proper name; subject (3rd person singular).
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'Papa'.
Degree adverb indicating excess; modifies 'ronfle'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'train'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Nous ronflons tous après ce long repas.
sentences.reading: /nu ʁɔ̃flɔ̃ tus apʁɛ sə lɔ̃ ʁəpa/

translations.fr: Nous ronflons tous après ce long repas.
translations.ipa: /nu ʁɔ̃flɔ̃ tus apʁɛ sə lɔ̃ ʁəpa/
translations.en: We all snore after that long meal.
translations.es: Todos roncamos después de esa larga comida.
translations.de: Wir schnarchen alle nach diesem langen Essen.
translations.it: Dopo quel lungo pasto russiamo tutti.
translations.ko: 긴 식사 후에 우리 모두 코를 골아.
translations.zh-Hans: 吃完那顿大餐后，我们都打呼噜了。
translations.yue: 食完嗰餐大餐之後我哋個個都打鼻鼾。
translations.ru: Мы все храпим после того долгого ужина.
translations.pt: Todos nós roncamos depois daquela longa refeição.
translations.he: כולנו נוחרים אחרי הארוחה הארוכה ההיא.
translations.tr: O uzun yemekten sonra hepimiz horluyoruz.
translations.vi: Sau bữa ăn dài đó, tất cả chúng tôi đều ngáy.
translations.ar: نحن جميعًا نشخر بعد تلك الوجبة الطويلة.
translations.nl: We snurken allemaal na die lange maaltijd.
translations.uk: Ми всі хропимо після тієї довгої трапези.
translations.hu: Az a hosszú vacsora után mindannyian horkolunk.
translations.hi: उस लंबे भोजन के बाद हम सब खर्राटे लेते हैं.
translations.pl: Wszyscy chrapiemy po tamtym długim posiłku.
translations.el: Μετά εκείνο το μεγάλο γεύμα όλοι ροχαλίζουμε.
translations.nb: Etter det lange måltidet snorker vi alle.
translations.id: Setelah makan panjang itu, kami semua mendengkur.
translations.sv: Efter den där långa måltiden snarkar vi allihop.
translations.ro: După acea masă lungă, toți sforăim.
translations.cs: Po tom dlouhém jídle všichni chrápeme.
translations.da: Efter det lange måltid snorker vi alle.
translations.fi: Sen pitkän aterian jälkeen me kaikki kuorsaamme.
translations.ja: あの長い食事のあと、私たちはみんないびきをかきます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; agrees with 'Nous'.
Distributive pronoun referring to the whole group (the subject); plural, functions adverbially with subject reference.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'repas'.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular; modifies 'repas'.
Common noun, masculine (invariable in number form here); head of the NP governed by 'après'.

translations.ko: 나는 코를 고는 것을 멈추고 싶어.
translations.pt: Eu gostaria de parar de roncar.
translations.nl: Ik wil graag stoppen met snurken.
translations.hi: मैं खर्राटे लेना बंद करना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θα ήθελα να σταματήσω να ροχαλίζω.
translations.nb: Jeg vil gjerne slutte å snorke.
translations.ro: Aș vrea să nu mai sforăi.
translations.da: Jeg vil gerne stoppe med at snorke.
translations.ja: いびきをやめたいです。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun elided before a vowel-initial verb form; 1st person singular.
Finite verb, conditional present, 1st person singular; expresses a polite desire and takes an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; complement (xcomp) of 'aimerais'.
Preposition required by 'arrêter' before an infinitive; introduces the infinitival complement.
Infinitive lexical verb; complement of 'de' after 'arrêter'.

jp: Papa ronfle trop dans le train.
Nous ronflons tous après ce long repas.
fu: /nu ʁɔ̃flɔ̃ tus apʁɛ sə lɔ̃ ʁəpa/
fr: Papa ronfle trop dans le train.
Nous ronflons tous après ce long repas.
ipa: /nu ʁɔ̃flɔ̃ tus apʁɛ sə lɔ̃ ʁəpa/
en: You snore too much at night.
Dad snores too much on the train.
We all snore after that long meal.
